headline: Monday momentum: Execute, don't think about the weekend.
summary: You're already losing faster than required (-0.73 kg/week vs -0.57 needed), so TODAY is about protecting that edge by eating only Huel and whole foods, then hitting 45 minutes on the rowing machine.
details: First: No emotional snacking today. You know Friday–Sunday will test you, so fuel today with three Huel meals (1200 kJ each) and one unprocessed vegan meal under 500 kJ. Nothing else crosses your lips. Second: Row for 45 minutes this morning before your sedentary work—non-negotiable. This builds the weekly deficit you need. Third: Today matters because it sets the mental pattern for the week; you're ahead of pace, but only if you stick the landing when weekend stress hits. Don't blow Monday.
